清理历史、标签、翻译缓存: Clear History, Tags, and Translation Cache
提示词优化和反推规则修改: Edit Prompt Optimization and Image Caption Rules
切换插件界面语言，修改后自动刷新页面生效: Switch extension UI language; page reloads automatically to apply changes.
打开配置弹窗过程中发生错误: An error occurred while opening the configuration dialog
关闭后，提示词小助手所有功能将禁用: After disabling, all Prompt Assistant features will be turned off.
自动创建：节点创建或加载时自动显示小助手；选中节点时创建：仅选中节点时显示: Auto: show assistant when nodes are created/loaded; Selection: show only when a node is selected.
自动创建：节点创建或加载时自动显示反推小助手；选中节点时创建：仅选中节点时显示: Auto: show image assistant when nodes are created/loaded; Selection: show only when selected.
设置提示词小助手在输入框周围的布局和展开方向: Set the Prompt Assistant layout and expansion direction around input fields.
设置图像反推小助手的展开方向（位置固定在左下角）: Set image assistant expansion direction (fixed at bottom-left).
选择一个服务商用于翻译，也可以通过右键翻译按钮来切换: Select a provider for translation, or switch from the translation button context menu.
选择一个服务商用于提示词优化，也可以通过右键提示词优化按钮来切换: Select a provider for prompt optimization, or switch from the prompt button context menu.
选择一个服务商用于图像反推，也可以通过右键反推按钮来切换: Select a provider for image caption, or switch from the caption button context menu.
开启或关闭历史、撤销、重做功能: Enable or disable history, undo, and redo.
开启后，如果翻译内容翻译过，则使用历史翻译结果，避免相同内容重复翻译改变原意。如: When enabled, previously translated text reuses cached results to avoid meaning drift; add a space to bypass cache.
关闭时，中英文混合内容的翻译结果不会写入缓存，避免污染缓存。开启后会正常缓存。: When disabled, mixed Chinese/English translations are not cached to avoid cache pollution.
根据个人使用偏好设置混合中英文内容的翻译规则: Set translation rules for mixed Chinese/English text by preference.
打开后，翻译结果会自动将中文标点符号替换成英文标点符号: When enabled, Chinese punctuation is converted to English punctuation.
打开后，翻译结果会自动移除多余空格: When enabled, extra spaces are removed automatically.
打开后，翻译结果会将多余的“......”统一为“...”: When enabled, repeated dots like “......” are normalized to “...”.
打开后，翻译结果会尽量保持原文的换行，避免翻译后丢失段落: When enabled, line breaks are preserved as much as possible.
开启或关闭图像反推提示词功能: Enable or disable image caption prompting.
开启或关闭ComfyUI侧边栏节点帮助文档的翻译功能: Enable or disable translation for ComfyUI sidebar node help docs.
设置日志输出级别：错误日志(仅错误)、基础日志(错误+基础信息)、详细日志(错误: Set log level: Error only, Basic, or Verbose.
开启后，控制台会显示流式输出过程，在某些终端可能导致刷屏；关闭后只显示静态的'生: When enabled, streaming progress is printed in console; disable to only show static 'Generating...'.
开启时，翻译、扩写、识别等功能将以逐字生成的流式效果显示；关闭时则恢复为全部生成: When enabled, features use token streaming; when disabled, output appears after full generation.
设置折叠后小助手图标的不透明度: Set assistant icon opacity when collapsed.
清理所有缓存，包括历史记录、标签、翻译缓存、节点文档翻译缓存: Clear all caches including history, tags, translation cache, and node-help translation cache.
可以自定义提示词优化规则，和反推提示词规则，使得提示词生成更加符合你的需求: Customize prompt optimization and caption rules to better match your needs.
创建设置弹窗过程中发生错误: An error occurred while creating the dialog
操作过程中发生错误: An error occurred during the operation
你仍然可以在搜索框中手动输入模型名称: You can still type a model name manually in the search box.
所有更改已成功保存到服务器: All changes were saved to the server successfully.
翻译规则仅支持编辑，不支持新增和删除: Translation rules support edit only; adding and deleting are disabled.
规则名称和内容不能为空: Rule name and content cannot be empty.
免责声明：本插件仅提供 API 调用工具，第三方服务责任与本插件无关，插件所涉用: Disclaimer: This plugin only provides API tooling. Third-party services are independent, and user config data stays local.
点击右上角\"+\"按钮新增第一个服务商: Click the + button to add your first service.
针对部分支持关闭思维链的模型进行关闭。⚠️：并不是所有模型都支持，关闭思维链的模: Disable CoT for supported models. ⚠️ Not all models support this; supported models show a “✏️” marker in logs.
启用后将发送 temperature、top_p、max_tokens 参数以精: When enabled, send temperature/top_p/max_tokens for finer control; disabling may improve compatibility.
针对无法关闭思维链模型，移除思考过程内容。默认开启。: For models that cannot disable CoT, remove reasoning content. Enabled by default.
请求完成后自动卸载模型以释放显存。⚠️该选项对针对前端小助手生效，节点有独立的选: Unload model after request to free VRAM. ⚠️ Applies to frontend assistant only; nodes have separate options.
2️⃣ 添加翻译、提示词优化的大语言模型 (LLM): 2️⃣ Add LLM models for translation and prompt optimization
3️⃣ 添加图像、视频反推的视觉模型 (VLM): 3️⃣ Add VLM models for image and video caption
暂无配置模型，点击\"+ 添加模型\"开始配置: No configured models. Click "+ Add Model" to start.
最大Token数应在 1 到 8192 之间: Max tokens must be between 1 and 8192.
暂无服务商，点击\"新增服务商\"开始配置: No services. Click "New Service" to start.
加载系统规则配置过程中发生错误: An error occurred while loading system rules.
未找到版本号，徽标将无法正确显示: Version not found; badge may not display correctly.
请输入要优化的提示词: Please enter prompt text to optimize
在此分类下创建新标签: Create a new tag in this category
标签名称和内容不能为空: Tag name and content cannot be empty
暂无收藏标签，在标签上右键点击可添加到收藏: No favorite tags yet. Right-click a tag to add it to favorites.
帧数截断详情: Model supports max {max} frames, {truncated} frame(s) ignored
建议不要在地址后方添加 /v1。不加 /v1 会走原生 Ollama API，加: Do not add /v1 after the address unless needed. Without /v1, native Ollama API is used; with /v1, OpenAI-compatible request format is used.
建议优先选择非思考模型或指令型（-instruct）模型，以减少思维链输出、截断: Prefer non-reasoning models or instruction-tuned (-instruct) models to reduce chain-of-thought output, truncation, and unstable responses.
